extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won from a seemingly hopeless position by threading a late gap on the barrier side inside final 100m, beating GAVIRIA who led out.
tactical_patterns: Direct Energie's MANZIN premature acceleration under the kite forced Bora-Hansgrohe leadout into recovery mode, disrupting their sprint train.
ACKERMANN won despite only one training ride in six days from illness, suggesting form peaks despite interrupted preparation.
Late crash inside 3km scattered leadout trains, favoring individual sprinters over organized teams in the final straight.

rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: Won from compromised position after illness (1 ride in 6 days) by exploiting barrier-side gap, shows exceptional finishing speed
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: Dropped from contention after early positioning work, couldn't sustain pace into final despite Merlier leadout attempt
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: neutral: Strong leadout execution from UAE got him clear, but lacked acceleration to hold off late-coming ACKERMANN
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: Crashed inside 3km while leading out Van der Poel, team disrupted at critical moment
rider_signals.MAGNUS CORT Nielsen: neutral: EF's pink jerseys prominent early but only managed podium finish, leadout insufficiently powerful
